reviewer_title: archivist: fix build_index.py to roll up historical runs from docs ledger \U0001F5C3️
summary: Updated `build_index.py` to aggregate historical runs stored in `.jules/docs/ledger.json` alongside active ones in `.jules/runs/`. This keeps historical truth unchanged in version control while making it visible in generated rollups.
proof_summary: Manually patched `build_index.py`, successfully ran it, and observed the new output index include historical runs. Confirmed it handles `ledger.json` formatting correctly.
